title: InstaWaypoints
description: When you press a keybind a slime with glowing spawns where you are looking . The slime is invincible so you cant kill it . This mod isn't done yet .
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46bd324e7087310dff46d4a578591be5295a0793.jpeg)


## In this mod, I've introduced a **keybind** that spawns a **slime** at the location you're currently looking at!
This slime spawns with a **glowing effect**, making it easy to spot even in dimly lit environments. This feature is particularly useful for quickly and clearly indicating to other players exactly where your focus is, enhancing communication and coordination during gameplay.
Whether you're highlighting a point of interest, marking a target, or simply showing off your favorite spot, this mod ensures that everyone can see what you're pointing out with ease.


If you have an bug with this mod please send it in this discord server :[https://discord.gg/zsD8anjAXM](https://discord.gg/zsD8anjAXM)
